name: PROTOCOL SUMMARY
guidanceText: Provide a short description of the protocol, including a brief statement of the study hypothesis. This should be only a few sentences in length. Include the study summary required by the NIH template for this section.

name: Synopsis
guidanceText: Provide a study-specific synopsis that summarizes the protocol requirements for this section.

name: Schema
guidanceText: Provide a study-specific schema or diagram that gives a quick snapshot of the study.

name: Schedule of Activities (SOA)
guidanceText: Provide the schedule of activities and assessments required by this section.

name: INTRODUCTION
guidanceText: Provide the background, rationale, and context required by the NIH template for this section.

name: OBJECTIVES AND ENDPOINTS
guidanceText: Provide the study objectives and endpoints required by the NIH template for this section.

name: STUDY DESIGN
guidanceText: Provide the overall study design and methods required by the NIH template for this section.

name: Study Rationale
guidanceText: Provide a study-specific rationale for conducting the clinical trial.

name: Background
guidanceText: Provide the background information and relevant literature required by the NIH template for this section.

name: Risk/Benefit Assessment
guidanceText: Provide the assessment of risks and benefits required by the NIH template for this section.

name: Known Potential Risks
guidanceText: Provide the known potential risks required by the NIH template for this section.

name: Assessment of Potential Risks and Benefits
guidanceText: Provide the assessment of potential risks and benefits required by the NIH template for this section.

name: Scientific Rationale for Study Design
guidanceText: Provide the rationale for the chosen study design required by the NIH template for this section.

name: STUDY POPULATION
guidanceText: Provide the study population details required by the NIH template for this section.

name: Lifestyle Considerations
guidanceText: Provide the lifestyle considerations required by the NIH template for this section.

name: STATEMENT OF COMPLIANCE
guidanceText: Provide the statement of compliance required by the NIH template for this section.

name: Study Overview
guidanceText: Provide a concise overview of the behavioral and social science protocol and its purpose.

name: Study Design
guidanceText: Describe the observational design and how participants or records will be followed.

name: Data Collection Procedures

name: Repository Contents

name: Source Materials
guidanceText: Describe the records or specimens that will be reviewed retrospectively.
